name: Lantern of Ember Stars
description: This brass lantern contains a slow orbit of ember-like motes. It is designed to stress-test generic item creation, magic item type selection, attunement text, charges, notes, modifiers, conditions, and attached spells.
notes: Stress-test generic item for local importer validation. Do not publish without review.

actions.name: Kindle Star
actions.description: Choose a point you can see within 60 feet. The lantern sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius centered on that point for 1 minute. Invisible creatures in the light do not benefit from being invisible.

actions.name: Bank the Flame
actions.description: Dim the lantern's light and gain advantage on the next Dexterity (Stealth) check you make before the end of your next turn.

modifiers.details: While holding the lantern, you gain a +1 bonus to spell attack rolls.
While attuned, the lantern grants darkvision out to 60 feet when lit.

conditions.details: Creatures revealed by Kindle Star lose the benefit of invisibility while they remain in the lantern's light.

spells.name: Faerie Fire
spells.details: You can expend 1 charge to cast Faerie Fire from the lantern. The lantern is the spellcasting focus.
